title: The Traitor Inside Egghead
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Vegapunk, Unknown person #1, Sentomaru, Saturn, Robin, Unknown person #2 as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: Island of the future Egghead laboratory

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who is the Conver- sation with?!,

dialogue.speaker: Sentomaru
dialogue.text: Uncle Kizaru?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 2f, building B

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: CPO's mission was to eliminate the doctor and then wait for Kizaru's arrival.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: The government's extra prepared it seems...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, they see this as an even more serious matter than "ohara".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Reason 1 being that the doctor took the forbidden research of Ohara...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And continued it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Reason 2 is that egghead has the combat strength...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: That Ohara didn't!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those reasons are enough for them to bring unexpected forces into action.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Call me if anything comes up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All communication equipment in the "labophase" are destroyed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Fabriophase Factory

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You heard that, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Learn from history and think about what the Navy could do here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You don't have time to hesitate

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: set sail! we are escaping this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: before the navy gets here!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Let's do as sir sentomaru said!

dialogue.speaker: Pythagoras
dialogue.text: Research area, 3f, building C

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: USSP!

dialogue.speaker: Shaka
dialogue.text: Lilith!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You goddamn brat!!,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Despite recent

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Undo this petification! My right side was off guard,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But my left side can still move!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you undo this right now, we'll forgive you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Clunk Clang

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Damn it!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
